The '''''Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith''''' is book filled with over sixty stickers of heroes, villains, [[:Category:Spacecraft|spacecraft]], [[:Category:Vehicles|vehicles]], [[Droid/Legends|droids]], and equipment from the [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. It was published by [[Dorling Kindersley]] in [[2005]].

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''Featuring more than 60 full-color, reusable stickers, now you can relive the excitement of ''Star Wars'': Episode III while creating your own sticker galleries of your favorite characters.''
